text:
AFP - Agence France Presse



Some 6,000 police will be deployed for the arrival of the Olympic flame in France next month, authorities said Friday as they announced bonuses for security forces to avert threatened industrial action.

The Barron's news department was not involved in the creation of the content above. This article was produced by AFP. For more information go toAFP.com.© Agence France-Presse
title: 6,000 French Police To Welcome Olympic Torch Amid Bonus Boost- Barron's
author: AFP - Agence France Presse
description: Some 6,000 police will be deployed for the arrival of the Olympic flame in France next month, authorities said Friday as they announced bonuses for security forces to avert threatened industrial action.
